steps.title: Square the scale factor
steps.content: Area changes by the square of the side-length scale factor. The model's side lengths are $\frac{1}{10}$ of the actual side lengths.

steps.title: Find the model area
steps.content:
The area scale factor is

$$(\frac{1}{10})^2=\frac{1}{100}$$

Apply it to the actual area:

$$900\cdot\frac{1}{100}=9$$

The answer is A.
